classification_rule.complete: Repository evidence proves one provider-neutral transaction across the named boundary.
classification_rule.partial: A component exists, but the lifecycle is provider-specific, projection-only, or lacks a symmetric fail-closed transition.
classification_rule.absent: No executable repository evidence closes the boundary.

invariants.name: provider_neutral_capability_discovery
invariants.gap: Execution evidence exists, but no connector lifecycle manifest projects discovered capabilities and revocation state symmetrically.

invariants.name: owner_visible_lifecycle_proof
invariants.gap: Connection surfaces exist, but there is no provider-neutral lifecycle receipt containing discovery, verification freshness, event posture, and revocation evidence.

invariants.name: generic_revoke_transaction
invariants.gap: The generic custody module ends at binding upsert and contains no symmetric revoke transaction.

invariants.name: revoked_use_fails_closed
invariants.gap: Inactive bindings are denied, but provider account rows, grants, capability projections, and owner surfaces are not revoked through one atomic lifecycle.

invariants.name: cross_surface_natural_language_decision_context
invariants.gap: SMS reaches the live employee, but the inbound turn does not carry a durable pointer to the exact approval/work object. A natural reply such as 'yeah, send it' therefore cannot safely enter the existing immutable approval resolver.

invariants.name: adaptive_first_use_activation
invariants.gap: The primer has limited contractor/bookkeeper emphasis but does not compile business context, tools, workflows, event posture, and connection state into a highest-gain activation plan.

candidate_trajectories.name: one_more_native_connector
candidate_trajectories.rejection: Does not close provider-neutral discovery, revoke, conversational owner decisions, or adaptive activation.

candidate_trajectories.name: generic_lifecycle_only
candidate_trajectories.rejection: Leaves natural cross-surface owner decisions and first-use activation disconnected from the lifecycle.

candidate_trajectories.name: adaptive_context_only
candidate_trajectories.rejection: Improves recommendations without proving custody, revoke, or exact conversational decision binding.

candidate_trajectories.name: connector_operating_substrate
candidate_trajectories.selection_basis: Only candidate satisfying every mandatory invariant; no weighted score or graph term is required.
